title: Peacemaker
subTitle: Peacemaker is praised and bonds with Harcourt in the alternate dimension, while Economos faces criticism for the mission's failure.

title: Peacemaker
subTitle: Chris joins a secret team to fight weird bugs living inside people around the world, travelling to many places to stop the bugs from spreading.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Carrie feels attraction towards Aidan but realises he refuses to date a smoker, compelling her to choose between Aidan and smoking. Meanwhile, Miranda struggles to support Steve's irrational ambition.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Carrie fails to understand why Aidan does not want to be intimate with her. Furthermore, she feels jaded when she finds out that Aidan abstains from intercourse for old-fashioned reasons.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Miranda and Steve are finally feeling comfortable together, until she watches the laundry. Meanwhile, Charlotte is inspired by a book to start looking for a fiance more methodically.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Charlotte becomes enamoured with Trey, whom she recently encountered by chance and already considers her future husband. Meanwhile, Carrie encounters Mr Big at an elegant boat party.

title: The Sopranos
subTitle: Ralph purchases a racehorse, but Tony develops a stronger attachment to it than Ralph does. Meanwhile, Carmela begins to invest in her future.

title: The Sopranos
subTitle: Ahead of Investor Day, Shiv weighs a proposal from Matsson while Kendall and Roman each try to match Logan's volatile leadership style.

title: The Sopranos
subTitle: Columbus Day ignites tensions between Italians and Native Americans. Meanwhile, Bobby receives devastating news about his wife.

title: The Sopranos
subTitle: A joke initiates a series of hit contracts, while Carmela experiences more happiness than she perhaps ought to about Furio's permanent presence.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Miranda and Steve fall out of love over parenthood and live separately in the same flat. Meanwhile, at Aidan Shaw's design fair, Carrie encounters Mr and Mrs Big.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Carrie feels guilty about her intimacy with Mr Big behind Aidan's back. Meanwhile, Charlotte's engagement bliss diminishes when Trey's family's prenuptial agreement appears.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Charlotte's wedding planning panic is easily solved when Samantha refers her to stylist Anthony Marantino. Meanwhile, paranoid Miranda worries about a man in a restaurant's sandwich costume.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Miranda tries multi-dating but quickly finds nobody wants a lawyer. Meanwhile, Samantha forms an instant connection with Trey's cousin Caleb.

title: Elementary
subTitle: Joan and Sherlock search for a murdered blackmailer's accomplice; Sherlock doesn't want to celebrate his first year of sobriety.

title: Elementary
subTitle: After receiving information from Sebastian Moran (Vinnie Jones), Sherlock resumes his search for Moriarty.

title: Entourage
subTitle: Vince tries to get Sasha a role in his new movie to keep her from starring in an adult film. Meanwhile, Turtle goes behind his boss' back to meet with Mark Cuban and Ari loses a business deal.

title: Entourage
subTitle: Ari's surprise birthday for Mrs Ari is undermined by work and the boys are worried about Vince's out-of-control behaviour. Meanwhile, Eric receives a business proposal from Terrance.

title: Entourage
subTitle: Drama freaks out when Vince returns from rehab and the gang decides to throw a huge party to celebrate. Meanwhile, E and Scott's new company is thriving and Drama clashes with his show's co-star.

title: Entourage
subTitle: Vince writes a screenplay and Billy Walsh decides to use Drama as the lead. Meanwhile, Ari learns what Mrs Ari has been up to and now has a sworn enemy.

subTitle: The battle between the Night's Watch and the wildlings commences.

subTitle: Jon makes an important decision while Daenerys experiences new consequences. Later, Brienne and Podrick have an unexpected encounter.

subTitle: Carmela and Furio grow close for safety. Meanwhile, Paulie unexpectedly discovers that he is not as big a fish as he thought he was.

subTitle: Vince tries to help out a fellow addict but things end badly while Ari decides to rekindle an old relationship. Later, Turtle receives news from Carlos about his investment in Avion.

subTitle: Ari continues his fling with former flame, Dana Gordon. However, after a bad session of couples therapy, Ari takes Dana out to Bobby Flay's restaurant to get back at his wife.
